title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.69%,the main contract closed 856, the quotation in the morning was increased by 10 yuan/mt overyesterday. and as the disk continues to rise, Traders' quotations are rising. But steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
